description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script to download the Miniconda installer, install it to $HOME/miniconda, source the conda profile, set always_yes, display conda info, create the environment from environment.yml and activate the pmc-citation-styles environment. Define a single job named tests (default stage) that executes the command pytest utils. Use the default Docker image (e.g., ubuntu:latest) with no services, caches, artifacts, or rules.
